title: (Bullish Signal) NTNX, RSI Indicator left the oversold zone on March 09, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a signal that NTNX's price could be shifting from a downtrend to an uptrend. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked back and found 21 similar cases where NTNX's RSI Indicator left the oversold zone, and in 16 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 76%. Current price $27.00 crossed the support line at $27.33 and is trading between $27.33 support and $25.41 resistance lines. Throughout the month of 02/04/21 - 03/09/21, the price experienced a -18% Downtrend. During the week of 03/02/21 - 03/09/21, the stock fell -9%.

https://preview.redd.it/wtgc3jrvo8m61.png?width=1530&format=png&auto=webp&s=691e401c7dd0cbfa7fd0cdb5785a44ed58010b21

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The RSI Oscillator points to a transition from a downward trend to an upward trend -- in cases where NTNX's RSI Oscillator exited the oversold zone, 16 of 21 resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 76%.

The Stochastic Indicator shows that the ticker has stayed in the oversold zone for 8 days. The price of this ticker is presumed to bounce back soon, since the longer the ticker stays in the oversold zone, the more promptly an upward trend is expected.

Following a +3.09% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where NTNX advanced for three days, in 230 of 272 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 85%.

NTNX may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron detected that in 173 of 211 cases where NTNX Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 82%.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/9781584-nutanix-inc-ordinary-shares-ntnx-27-12-rsi-indicator-left-the-oversold-zone-on-march-09-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
